change_scope: No in-repo code change is approved for this repair; the missing prerequisite is external PostgreSQL test DB availability for the existing Rails/model regression gate.
targets.acceptance_signal: The command `env -u AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID -u AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY -u AWS_SESSION_TOKEN -u AWS_REGION bundle exec rspec spec/services/collect/blob_storage_spec.rb spec/models/source_spec.rb spec/models/sync_checkpoint_spec.rb spec/core/collect` exits 0 without expanding scope.

global_constraints: Do not expand scope beyond the active plan allowlist.
Do not patch Rails boot, DB wiring, or credentials handling as a silent workaround.
Treat the open item as an external runtime prerequisite, not as a code defect in BlobStorage.
